ddls:
CREATE TABLE "quests" (
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quest */,
  "act_number" INTEGER /* Act number in which the quest is located */,
  "chapter_number" INTEGER /* Chapter number in which the quest is located */,
  "act_image" TEXT /* Image representing the quest or act */,
  "reward_exp" INTEGER /* Experience points rewarded for completing the quest */,
  "reward_adena" INTEGER /* In-game currency (Adena) rewarded for completing the quest */,
  "reward_param1" INTEGER /* Parameter for the first reward item */,
  "reward_count1" INTEGER /* Quantity of the first reward item */,
  "reward_param2" INTEGER /* Parameter for the second reward item */,
  "reward_count2" INTEGER /* Quantity of the second reward item */,
  "reward_param3" INTEGER /* Parameter for the third reward item */,
  "reward_count3" INTEGER /* Quantity of the third reward item */,
  "quest_name" TEXT /* Name of the quest */,
  "quest_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the quest */,
  "required_level" INTEGER /* Minimum level required to start the quest */,
  "required_items" TEXT /* List of items required to start the quest */,
  "quest_status" TEXT /* Status of the quest (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "quest_type" TEXT /* Type of the quest (e.g., main, side, daily) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quests_chapter_number FOREIGN KEY ("chapter_number") REFERENCES chapters ("chapter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quests_act_number FOREIGN KEY ("act_number") REFERENCES acts ("act_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "acts" (
  "act_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each act */,
  "act_number" INTEGER /* Number of the act */,
  "act_name" TEXT /* Name of the act */,
  "act_description" TEXT /* Description of the act */,
  "chapter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the chapter the act belongs to */,
  "act_status" TEXT /* Status of the act (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("act_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acts_chapter_id FOREIGN KEY ("chapter_id") REFERENCES chapters ("chapter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chapters" (
  "chapter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chapter */,
  "chapter_number" INTEGER /* Number of the chapter */,
  "chapter_name" TEXT /* Name of the chapter */,
  "chapter_description" TEXT /* Description of the chapter */,
  "chapter_status" TEXT /* Status of the chapter (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chapter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "item_rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the item (e.g., common, rare, epic) */,
  "item_value" INTEGER /* In-game value or cost of the item */,
  "item_icon" TEXT /* Icon or image of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's progress record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quest completed */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the quest was completed */,
  "exp_earned" INTEGER /* Experience points earned from the quest */,
  "adena_earned" INTEGER /* In-game currency (Adena) earned from the quest */,
  "item_rewards" TEXT /* List of items rewarded for completing the quest */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "quest_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the player started the quest */,
  "quest_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the quest in minutes */,
  "quest_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of attempts made by the player */,
  "quest_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the player for the quest (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_progress_quest_id FOREIGN KEY ("quest_id") REFERENCES quests ("quest_id")
)
